featureType.name: project_per_quadrant
featureType.title: project_per_quadrant
featureType.nativeCRS: GEOGCS["WGS 84", DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984", SPHEROID["WGS 84", 6378137.0, 298.257223563, AUTHORITY["EPSG","7030"]], AUTHORITY["EPSG","6326"]], PRIMEM["Greenwich", 0.0, AUTHORITY["EPSG","8901"]], UNIT["degree", 0.017453292519943295], AXIS["Geodetic longitude", EAST], AXIS["Geodetic latitude", NORTH], AUTHORITY["EPSG","4326"]]

virtualTable.name: project_per_quadrant
virtualTable.sql: SELECT q.id, (SELECT id FROM atlas.record_validation_status WHERE priority=max(status.priority) LIMIT 1) AS max_valid_status, q.geom_wgs FROM geodata.quadrants_full q JOIN atlas.records r ON ST_Within(r.coords_wgs, q.geom_wgs) JOIN atlas.record_validation_status as status ON (r.validation_status=status.id ) WHERE r.taxon_id = %TAXON_ID% AND r.project_id = %PROJECT_ID% GROUP BY q.id
